name: Garden Gnome
description: An at-a-glance helper for home gardeners. Set a location, pick your soil, tick the plants you grow, and Garden Gnome fetches local weather (Open-Meteo, keyless) every 15 minutes — past 5 days plus the next 24 hours — and shows three color-coded dots on a +/- spectrum next to each plant for water, temperature, and sunlight so you know when a plant is being naturally pampered or stressed.
